speaker: Usopp
dialogue_text: Huh?! [username], is that you? Perfect timing! The Great Captain Usopp was just about to start a legendary recipe!

speaker: Usopp
dialogue_text: Today, we're crafting my world-famous, enemy-stunning, heart-melting CHEESE BALLS! Stay close, [username] — things might get dangerously delicious.

speaker: Usopp
dialogue_text: Don’t worry, [username]! With Captain Usopp guiding you, nothing will explode! ...Probably.

speaker: Usopp
dialogue_text: First, gather your battle supplies. A true warrior of the kitchen must be prepared!

speaker: Usopp
dialogue_text: Refined flour
Degi red chilli powder
Ginger-garlic paste
Salt & baking soda

speaker: Usopp
dialogue_text: Fresh bread crumbs
Hard cheese for stuffing
More bread crumbs for coating
Oil for frying

speaker: Usopp
dialogue_text: Mozzarella cheese
Processed cheese
Paneer
Boiled potatoes
Green chillies & ginger
Coriander leaves

speaker: Usopp
dialogue_text: [username], grab a big bowl! It’s time to begin the sacred mixing ceremony.

speaker: Usopp
dialogue_text: Throw in mozzarella, processed cheese, paneer, and potatoes. Mash them like you're forging mighty cannon ammo!

speaker: Usopp
dialogue_text: Now add green chillies, ginger, and coriander. These are flavor traps, [username] — deadly to blandness!

speaker: Usopp
dialogue_text: Add refined flour, chilli powder, ginger-garlic paste, salt, baking soda, and bread crumbs. Mix! Mix like your life depends on it!

speaker: Usopp
dialogue_text: It should come together into a soft but firm dough. Just like a warrior’s spirit, huh [username]?

speaker: Usopp
dialogue_text: Now comes the fun part — shaping the legendary cheese spheres! Take a portion, [username].

speaker: Usopp
dialogue_text: Make a small hollow inside and sneak in a piece of hard cheese. A secret surprise attack!

speaker: Usopp
dialogue_text: Roll it into a perfect ball. Tight, smooth, and heroic — just like me! Try to match my form, [username]!

speaker: Usopp
dialogue_text: Repeat until your army of cheese balls is ready for battle.

speaker: Usopp
dialogue_text: Now! Prepare the slurry — the ultimate adhesive armor.

speaker: Usopp
dialogue_text: Mix refined flour, salt, and water. No lumps allowed, [username]! A true sniper needs precision!

speaker: Usopp
dialogue_text: Heat oil in a kadai. Medium flame — the perfect battlefield temperature.

speaker: Usopp
dialogue_text: Dip a cheese ball into the slurry. Coat it well, [username]!

speaker: Usopp
dialogue_text: Now roll it in bread crumbs. FULL coverage! We need max defense!

speaker: Usopp
dialogue_text: Repeat the armoring process for all cheese balls. No soldier left behind!

speaker: Usopp
dialogue_text: Alright [username]… IT’S FRYING TIME! Drop them gently into the hot oil.

speaker: Usopp
dialogue_text: Fry until golden, crispy, and puffed up like heroic victory orbs!

speaker: Usopp
dialogue_text: Lift them out carefully… unless you want battle scars like mine! Just kidding—don’t burn yourself, [username].

speaker: Usopp
dialogue_text: LOOK AT THEM! Glorious golden cheese balls! Even villains would surrender at first bite!

speaker: Usopp
dialogue_text: Serve them hot with ketchup. But be warned, [username]… they vanish fast!

speaker: Usopp
dialogue_text: You’ve done it! Another victory! The Great Usopp officially recognizes you as a Cheese Ball Warrior!
